slide8.title: Product
slide8.subtitle: 3 parallel tracks · Q2 2026 → 2027+ · Infrastructure × Intelligence × Compliance

milestones.title: Core Shipping Engine
milestones.detail: Unified REST + GraphQL gateway aggregating 40+ carrier APIs (FedEx, DHL, UPS, SF Express, Cainiao). Automated label generation with barcode/QR, customs CN22/CN23, and return labels. Rate-shopping engine compares real-time quotes across all carriers.

milestones.title: Edge-Native Scaling
milestones.detail: Cloudflare Workers + Durable Objects at 300+ PoPs worldwide. Guaranteed sub-100ms P95 latency for tracking and rate queries. Auto-scaling from 0 to 50K req/s with zero cold starts. Regional data residency for EU (Dublin), APAC (Tokyo), CN (Shanghai).

milestones.title: WMS Deep Sync
milestones.detail: Bi-directional inventory sync with ShipStation, ShipBob, Flexport, and custom WMS via webhooks + polling fallback. Real-time stock level mesh prevents overselling across 10+ sales channels. Pick-pack-ship workflow automation with barcode scan verification.

milestones.title: Global Expansion
milestones.detail: Full multi-tenant architecture supporting 500+ concurrent brand accounts. White-label portal with custom domains, branding, and email templates. Localized checkout with 25+ currencies and region-specific carrier preferences. Partner API marketplace for 3PL integrations.

milestones.title: AI Address Parsing
milestones.detail: Transformer-based NER model trained on 50M+ global addresses across 12 languages. Handles unstructured input, abbreviations, and transliteration (Chinese ↔ Pinyin, Japanese ↔ Romaji). 99.7% accuracy with auto-correction suggestions. Reduces failed deliveries by 35%.

milestones.title: MCP Protocol V1
milestones.detail: Model Context Protocol bridge connecting ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Grok to live logistics data. Natural language queries: 'Where is my shipment?' → real-time tracking + ETA. Tool-calling architecture with 12 registered functions: track, quote, book, cancel, reroute, documents, compliance, analytics, alerts, bulk, returns, customs.

milestones.title: IoT Node Network
milestones.detail: BLE/LoRa sensor mesh for temperature (-40°C to +80°C), humidity, shock, and light exposure. Real-time alerts via webhook + SMS + email when thresholds are breached. FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliant audit trail for pharmaceutical and food logistics. Dashboard with heatmaps showing cold-chain integrity across routes.

milestones.title: Autonomous Logistics
milestones.detail: Reinforcement learning engine that continuously optimizes carrier selection, routing, and consolidation. Predictive demand forecasting based on historical patterns + external signals (weather, holidays, strikes). Auto-rerouting around disruptions with cost-impact analysis. Target: 15% cost reduction and 22% faster delivery times.

milestones.title: GDPR & Privacy
milestones.detail: Full GDPR Article 28 compliance with dedicated EU data processing in Dublin. Supabase Row-Level Security (RLS) ensuring tenant data isolation. Automated data retention policies with right-to-erasure workflows. Privacy-by-design architecture with field-level encryption for PII.

milestones.title: Carbon ISO 14067
milestones.detail: ISO 14067-certified carbon footprint calculator for every shipment. Scope-3 emissions tracking across the full logistics chain: first-mile, line-haul, last-mile, warehousing. Carbon offset marketplace integration with verified credits (Gold Standard, Verra). Sustainability dashboard with monthly ESG reporting for enterprise clients.

milestones.title: Customs Autopilot
milestones.detail: AI-powered HS code classification with 98.5% accuracy across 5,000+ product categories. Automated generation of commercial invoices, packing lists, and certificates of origin. Direct integration with customs authorities in EU, US, CN, and JP for e-filing. Denied party screening and dual-use goods detection in real-time.

milestones.title: Green Standards Leader
milestones.detail: Carbon-neutral operations certified by Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi). Green carrier scoring algorithm prioritizing EVs, rail, and consolidated shipments. Packaging waste reduction program: AI-driven box-size optimization reduces void fill by 40%. Annual sustainability report with verified Scope 1-3 emissions data.

slide9.title: Security

cards.title: Military-Grade Defense

cards.description: Zero-Trust Architecture: AES-256 at-rest, TLS 1.3 in-transit. PostgreSQL RLS at kernel level.

cards.title: ESG Automation

cards.description: Built-in ISO 14067 carbon accounting. Meet EU environmental standards with zero manual effort.

chatMessages.text: Hello! I'm your AI Compliance Assistant. I can help you navigate BRC, HACCP, ISO 22000 and other food-safety standards. What would you like to know?
What's our current BRC compliance status?
Your BRC Food Safety compliance is at 96.1% — Grade A projected. There are 3 minor non-conformances in cold-chain documentation that I recommend addressing before the next audit window on June 15.
